components.name: 1. Seed 200-1000 cells/well (6-well)
components.note: 高 PE 细胞 (HeLa): 200 cells; 低 PE 细胞: 500–1000; 先做预实验确定最佳密度

notes.en: Plating efficiency = colonies/cells × 100%. Surviving fraction = PE(treated)/PE(control). Triplicate.
notes.zh: 接种效率 = 克隆数/细胞数 × 100%。存活分数 = PE(处理)/PE(对照)。三重复。

briefSteps.en: Seed 200–1000 single cells per well (6-well plate) → allow attachment → apply treatment → culture 10–14 days with medium change every 3 days → fix with methanol → stain 0.5% crystal violet → count colonies (>50 cells each) → calculate plating efficiency and surviving fraction
briefSteps.zh: 每孔铺 200–1000 个单细胞（6 孔板）→ 贴壁后给药处理 → 培养 10–14 天（每 3 天换液）→ 甲醇固定 → 0.5% 结晶紫染色 → 计数克隆（每个 >50 细胞）→ 计算铺板效率和存活分数

detailedSteps.en: Prepare a single-cell suspension (verify with hemocytometer; viability >90%); seed 200–1000 cells per well in a 6-well plate in 2 mL complete medium — high plating efficiency lines (e.g., HeLa): 200 cells; low PE lines: 500–1000 cells; run a pilot experiment to optimize density.
detailedSteps.zh: 制备单细胞悬液（用血球计数板验证；活力 >90%）；每孔铺 200–1000 个细胞（6 孔板，2 mL 完全培养基）——高铺板效率细胞系（如 HeLa）：200 细胞；低铺板效率细胞系：500–1000 细胞；先做预实验确定最佳密度。

detailedSteps.en: Allow cells to attach at 37°C, 5% CO₂ for 6–24 h before adding treatment.
detailedSteps.zh: 37°C、5% CO₂ 培养 6–24 h，待细胞贴壁后再给药。

detailedSteps.en: Replace medium with 2 mL complete medium containing test compound at desired concentration; set up triplicate wells per condition; include untreated control and solvent control.
detailedSteps.zh: 换液至含受试化合物的完全培养基（每孔 2 mL）；每组处理设三复孔；设未处理对照和溶剂对照。

detailedSteps.en: Incubate at 37°C, 5% CO₂ for 10–14 days; change medium gently every 3 days (aspirate half the medium and replace to avoid dislodging colonies); check plates regularly under inverted microscope.
detailedSteps.zh: 37°C、5% CO₂ 培养 10–14 天；每 3 天轻柔换液（吸去一半培养基再补加，避免冲掉克隆）；定期在倒置显微镜下观察克隆生长。
染色日 – 固定与染色

detailedSteps.en: Aspirate medium; wash wells once gently with 2 mL PBS; fix with 1 mL methanol per well for 10–15 min at room temperature (or use 4% PFA for 20 min).
detailedSteps.zh: 吸去培养基；用 2 mL PBS 轻柔洗一次；每孔加 1 mL 甲醇，室温固定 10–15 min（或用 4% PFA 固定 20 min）。

detailedSteps.en: Remove fixative; add 1 mL 0.5% crystal violet solution per well; incubate 15–30 min at room temperature; wash excess stain thoroughly with water until washings run clear; air-dry plates.
detailedSteps.zh: 去除固定液；每孔加 1 mL 0.5% 结晶紫溶液；室温染色 15–30 min；充分水洗去除多余染料，直至洗涤液澄清；晾干培养板。

detailedSteps.en: Count colonies containing ≥50 cells (use a colony counter, ImageJ, or manual counting with a grid); record colony number per well.
detailedSteps.zh: 计数含 ≥50 个细胞的克隆（用克隆计数仪、ImageJ 或网格辅助手动计数）；记录每孔克隆数。

detailedSteps.en: Calculate plating efficiency (PE) = (colonies counted / cells seeded) × 100%; calculate surviving fraction = PE(treated) / PE(control).
detailedSteps.zh: 计算铺板效率（PE）= 克隆数 / 铺板细胞数 × 100%；计算存活分数 = PE（处理组）/ PE（对照组）。

note.en: Colony growth phase (10–14 days at 37°C) is a natural multi-day stopping point; change medium every 3 days
note.zh: 克隆生长阶段（37°C 培养 10–14 天）是自然的多日停顿点；每 3 天换液一次

note.en: Fixed and crystal violet-stained plates can be air-dried and stored at room temperature indefinitely before counting
note.zh: 固定并经结晶紫染色后晾干的培养板可在室温下无限期保存，之后再计数

usage.en: Measure the ability of single cells to form colonies (clonogenic survival assay).
usage.zh: 检测单个细胞形成克隆的能力（克隆形成实验）。
